sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23180" key="dadu/ssomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δαδύσσομαι</orth>, <sense id="n23180.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be distracted,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐν ὅσσῳ δέει δαδύσσεσθε</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0524.tlg001:117" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sophr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">117</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
